g.text: Negative testing — invalid, missing, out-of-range inputs
Submit with blank company or role
Letters or symbols in score field
Spaces only in company or role field
Query returns zero results, empty state shown
Send with blank input — no action taken
Delete all data, render empty pipeline
Malformed date string in date field
Edge case testing — boundary, extreme, and unexpected states
No score entered — renders dash, no crash
All views render with exactly one job
Kanban — one full col, four empty cols
Null scores sorted to end, no crash
Color map fallback to default accent
Selection state vs filtered view reconciled

svg.text: 12 negative tests · 12 edge case tests · 24 total
